stemHtml: When do ICAO Annex 2 and SERA apply?

options.a: Only to aircraft registered in a Member State in controlled airspace.
options.b: Only to IFR flights in Member State territory.
options.c: ICAO Annex 2 applies only over the high seas.
options.d: SERA applies to all aircraft within a Member State; beyond, ICAO Annex 2 applies.
